title: Suspense Account Clearance Routing
description: A reconciliation and back-office workflow that resolves breaks, validates accounting alignment, and closes audit-critical exceptions. Focus case: suspense account clearance routing.
assumptions: Each reconciliation_case is a unique entity and represents a single audit-traceable exception.
Resources indicated as available (e.g., remediation_activity, authorized_verifier) are consumed while assigned and restored when unbound.
Supporting documents and verifier credentials are required for specific approval flows as reflected in preconditions.
Escalation and approval units are distinct organizational roles with defined responsibilities.
risks: Resource contention: single-use resources (verifiers, remediation slots) may block case advancement.
Data quality issues in source_systems or misclassification of exception_reason_code can prevent automated resolution.
Insufficient evidence or missing supporting_document may cause cases to stagnate and fail audit timeliness.
